productDisplayName: Gini Jony Girls Printed White Top
description: Style Note Gini & Jony's fun tee for girls, crafted from supersoft cotton, so comfy she'll never want to take it off. Conjured up from the whimsical elements of childhood, this simple striped tee is a summer must-have! Product Details White round neck top, has cap sleeves and 'Love Laugh Live' print on front Material and Care 95% cotton and 5% lycra Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
